sections.description: Configure the AI's pretender god form and starting attributes

commands.name: form
commands.description: Physical form of the pretender (monster name, optionally with ID in parentheses like 'Dragon (265)').

commands.name: bless
commands.description: Bless effect name to select for this pretender.

sections.description: Configure the AI's preferred dominion scales

commands.name: scale
commands.description: Set scale value: <scale number> <value>. Scales: 0=Order/Turmoil, 1=Productivity/Sloth, 2=Heat/Cold, 3=Growth/Death, 4=Fortune/Misfortune, 5=Magic/Drain. Values range from -5 to 5.

sections.description: Configure AI research goals and favorite rituals/items

commands.name: researchgoal
commands.description: Spell or item name for AI to research. Multiple goals can be set and will be researched in order.

commands.name: favrit
commands.description: AI favorite ritual/item: <disschool> <level> "name". Set disschool and level to -1,-1 to never disable. Otherwise specifies when to stop prioritizing.
